issues: Code imports fetch_reddit_activity from crazy.adapters.reddit_activity as required.

Code uses adapter output columns not matching the adapter contract: adapter returns ['date', 'posts', 'comments'], but code expects 'mention_count', 'price', 'sma_20', 'sma_14_mentions' columns which are not provided by the adapter.
Signal logic assumes columns and metrics not defined or returned by the adapter, violating the adapter contract.
Signal logic correctly implements the spec intent for entry and exit conditions based on mention count spike and price vs SMA, but on data columns not provided by adapter.
Position sizing logic correctly allocates 5% per position on BUY (RISK_ON) and no allocation on SELL (RISK_OFF) or HOLD.
Overall fail due to mismatch between adapter contract and code's expected data columns.
